name: launchpad-lookalike-with-path
description: A Launchpad look-alike carrying a path (…/path) is NOT the Launchpad issuer under the origin-root profile, so the selection heuristic must not exclude it as Launchpad. With BC5 also advertised there are two non-Launchpad candidates → HARD ambiguous_issuers; the SDK never silently drops the malformed value nor guesses BC5. Guards the origin-normalization bug where comparing only URL.origin/same_origin would misclassify the look-alike as Launchpad.
